create.title: New care circle
create.subtitle: Create a circle to coordinate care with family and caregivers.
create.selfCareHint: You'll be the care recipient. Invite family or caregivers to help.
create.limitReached: You've reached the maximum of 5 circles.

joinModal.title: Join a circle
joinModal.subtitle: Enter the invite code you received from a family member.
joinModal.invalidCode: We couldn't find that invite code. Double-check it and try again.
joinModal.expired: This invite has expired. Ask the person who invited you for a new one.
joinModal.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.
joinModal.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this circle.
joinModal.joinFailed: We couldn't join this circle. Please try again.

edit.title: Circle settings
edit.subtitle: Update who this circle is caring for.
edit.ownerOnlyTitle: Only the circle owner can edit this
edit.ownerOnlyMessage: Ask the circle owner to update these details.
edit.conditionsHint: Separate each condition with a comma.
edit.deleteDescription: Deleting this circle removes it for everyone. This can't be undone.
edit.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the circle for {{name}} and remove access for all members.
